title: origins+machines
description:
this modpack has parts of origins and create in it.
made for smp's
body:
# Origins+Machines
# TYSM FOR ~~1000+~~ 3K DOWNLOADS!!
this modpack adds mods to do with **origins**, **create** and **valkyrien skies**.  
## some of the features are
- many new [**origins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
- [**create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and some addons like [**create interactive**](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactive)
- more food from [**farmers delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
- [**waystones**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones)
- [**xaeros world map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) and [**xaeros minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- new world generation with [**lithosphere**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lithosphere)
- built in multiplayer with [**essential**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- random origin on first join(if you also install [**origins randomizer**](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-randomiser), not included in modpack)
- free cape with [**skinmc**](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinmc)
- and performance improvements with mods like [**sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
## those are only some of the features, play this modpack to find them all!
- updated when i update it lol
- also to unbind bind it to escape
- if you name a mob lil it will become a baby and never grow up
